utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: As bad as that went , I actually enjoyed myself . I think that I am going to apologize for all of the stupid things I do .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Why do not you just stop doing stupid things ? Then you would not have to apologize .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I would really love it if I could do both .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: All right , I ... I have to ask .

emotion_cause.span: 6_Are you gonna break up with me if I get fat again ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Are you gonna break up with me if I get fat again ?

6_Are you gonna break up with me if I get fat again ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Well , you broke up with Julie Grath ! How much weight could she have gained ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: A hundred and forty ... five pounds .
